Public Remarks: Prime commercial property on Commerce Parkway in the heart of Sarasota's business district. 12,500 sq ft flex-use building on 1.72 acres with heavy-duty parking. Currently operating as light industrial warehouse with office suite. Loading dock, 18-ft ceilings, 3-phase 400A electrical service. Excellent I-75 visibility. Ideal for owner-user or investor.
Directions: From I-75 Exit 210, head west on Bee Ridge Rd, right on US-41 (Tamiami Trail), left on Commerce Pkwy. Property on right at 4800.
